PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-12-2005.

NO APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO VACATE THE COURT ORDER SETTING MATTER TO ARBITRATION IN LIEU OF MEDIATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. ORDER SIGNED. COURT ORDERED CASE SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON 4/24/2006 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. COURT TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate The Court Order Of Setting Matter To Arbitration In Lieu Of Madiation
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Defendant's Motion to Vacate the court order setting Matter to Arbitration in Lieu of Mediation is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Court ordered case set for Jury Trial on 4/24/2006 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Case to be assigned to the San Francisco's Bar Association's Early Settlement Program. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)
